bash_policy: Sandbox blocks multi-stmt compounds, ls/mkdir/cat/sed outside repo, for-loops, backtick grep, git on /tmp. go build blocked (lint via Grep/Read). gh issue/search --json 'Malformed version:' — open-issue check unreliable, rely on memory+7d expiry. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT touch /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory. KEEP MEMORY SMALL — ~10KB total changed-file limit; compact strategies.jsonl to recent entries.
